semantic_description: The function scans an input integer array of length n with a single for loop and accumulates the elements whose indices are even. The result must equal array_sum_even_indices_spec(l), a Coq recursive specification over the input list that adds positions 0, 2, 4, and so on. The loop may execute zero times when n is 0. The function reads but does not modify the array, so IntArray::full(a, n, l) must be preserved.
